introductionSomali: Unit-kan waxaad ku baranaysaa saacadda, past/to, half/quarter, qaybaha maalinta, days, months, dates, at/on/in, timetables iyo appointments.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar weydiinta saacadda, digital time, noon iyo midnight.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: What time is it? waxaa loola jeedaa Saacaddu waa imisa?. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
What's the time? waxaa loola jeedaa Waa imisa saacaddu?. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Do you know the time? waxaa loola jeedaa Ma taqaan saacadda?. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
O'clock waxaa loola jeedaa Saacad buuxda. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Noon waxaa loola jeedaa Duhurkii 12:00. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Midnight waxaa loola jeedaa Saqda dhexe 12:00 habeenimo. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Six thirty waxaa loola jeedaa 6:30. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Seven fifteen waxaa loola jeedaa 7:15. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Nine forty-five waxaa loola jeedaa 9:45. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Start work waxaa loola jeedaa Shaqada bilow. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Begin waxaa loola jeedaa Bilow. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Digital time waxaa loola jeedaa Saacad tirooyin ah. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.

grammar.explanationSomali: What time is it? waxay weydiinaysaa waqtiga hadda. What time do/does…? waxay weydiinaysaa goorta hawl joogto ahi dhacdo. Digital time-ka waxaa loo akhriyi karaa saacadda kadib daqiiqadaha.
grammar.rule: What time + is it? / What time + do/does + subject + base verb?

positiveExamples.somali: Waa shanta iyo shan iyo labaatan daqiiqo.

questionExamples.english: What time do you start work?
What time does the lesson begin?

commonMistakesSomali: O’clock waxaa la isticmaalaa saacad buuxda oo keliya.
6:30 waxaa la oran karaa six thirty.

examples.somali: Waa shanta iyo shan iyo labaatan daqiiqo.
Waa sagaalka iyo shan iyo afartan daqiiqo.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What time does the lesson begin?

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar daqiiqadaha saacadda dhaafay iyo kuwa ka harsan saacadda xigta.
learningObjectives: To iyo next hour sax u isticmaal.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Past waxaa loola jeedaa Saacadda dhaafay. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
To waxaa loola jeedaa Saacadda xigta ka harsan. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Five past waxaa loola jeedaa Shan daqiiqo dhaafay. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Ten past waxaa loola jeedaa Toban daqiiqo dhaafay. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Twenty past waxaa loola jeedaa Labaatan daqiiqo dhaafay. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Twenty-five past waxaa loola jeedaa 25 daqiiqo dhaafay. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Five to waxaa loola jeedaa Shan daqiiqo ka harsan. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Labaatan ayaa ka harsan laba iyo tobanka.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Twenty to waxaa loola jeedaa Labaatan daqiiqo ka harsan. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.

grammar.explanationSomali: Past wuxuu sheegaa daqiiqadaha saacadda hadda dhaafay, inta badan 1–30. To wuxuu sheegaa daqiiqadaha ka harsan saacadda xigta, inta badan 31–59.
grammar.rule: minutes + past + current hour; minutes remaining + to + next hour

positiveExamples.somali: Waa sagaalka iyo shan iyo labaatan daqiiqo.
Waxaa shan daqiiqo ka harsan tobanka.
Waxaa toban daqiiqo ka harsan kow iyo tobanka.

commonMistakesSomali: 8:40 waa twenty to nine, ma aha twenty to eight.
To marka la isticmaalo saacadda xigta sheeg.

examples.somali: Waa sagaalka iyo shan iyo labaatan daqiiqo.
Waxaa shan daqiiqo ka harsan tobanka.
Waxaa toban daqiiqo ka harsan kow iyo tobanka.
Waxaa labaatan daqiiqo ka harsan laba iyo tobanka.

lines.english: Yes, it is twenty to nine.
lines.somali: Haa, labaatan ayaa ka harsan sagaalka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar half past, quarter past iyo quarter to iyo digital equivalents.
learningObjectives: Quarter past iyo quarter to kala saar.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Half past waxaa loola jeedaa Saacadda iyo 30 daqiiqo. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Quarter waxaa loola jeedaa Rubuc/15 daqiiqo. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Quarter past waxaa loola jeedaa Saacadda iyo 15 daqiiqo. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Quarter to waxaa loola jeedaa 15 daqiiqo ka harsan saacadda xigta. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Half an hour is thirty minutes.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Thirty minutes waxaa loola jeedaa 30 daqiiqo. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Fifteen minutes waxaa loola jeedaa 15 daqiiqo. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.

grammar.explanationSomali: Half past waa 30 daqiiqo oo saacadda dhaafay. Quarter past waa 15 daqiiqo dhaafay. Quarter to waa 15 daqiiqo ka harsan saacadda xigta.
grammar.rule: 30 = half past; :15 = quarter past; :45 = quarter to next hour

positiveExamples.somali: Waa laba iyo tobanka iyo badhka.
11:45 waa rubuc ka harsan laba iyo tobanka.

commonMistakesSomali: 9:45 waa quarter to ten, ma aha quarter to nine.
Quarter waxaa loola jeedaa 15 daqiiqo.

examples.somali: Waa laba iyo tobanka iyo badhka.
11:45 waa rubuc ka harsan laba iyo tobanka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar relative-day expressions adigoon gelin past/future grammar qoto dheer.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Today waxaa loola jeedaa Maanta. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Tomorrow waxaa loola jeedaa Berri. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Yesterday waxaa loola jeedaa Shalay. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The visit was the day before yesterday.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: The day before yesterday waxaa loola jeedaa Doraad. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The class is the day after tomorrow.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: The day after tomorrow waxaa loola jeedaa Saadambe. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
This morning waxaa loola jeedaa Saaka. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
This afternoon waxaa loola jeedaa Galabta. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: I have a lesson this evening.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: This evening waxaa loola jeedaa Fiidkan. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
Tonight waxaa loola jeedaa Caawa. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.

grammar.explanationSomali: Today waa maanta, tomorrow waa berri, yesterday waa shalay. Was iyo will waxaa halkan loogu isticmaalayaa qaabab diyaar ah oo fudud; tense-kooda qoto dheer hadda lama baranayo.
grammar.rule: Today is…; Yesterday was…; We meet tomorrow.

positiveExamples.english: I have a lesson this evening.
The exam is the day after tomorrow.

commonMistakesSomali: Tonight waa caawa; this evening waa fiidkan.
Future/past grammar qoto dheer looma baahna casharkan.

examples.english: I have a lesson this evening.

At July waa khalad; in July ayaa sax ah.
Gregorian months ha lagu khaldin Islamic months.

lessons.titleEnglish: Prepositions of Time — At, On and In
lessons.titleSomali: Erayada waqtiga ee At, On iyo In
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar at waqti gaar ah, on maalin/taariikh, iyo in bil/sannad/qayb maalinta.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: At waxaa loola jeedaa Waqti gaar ah. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
On waxaa loola jeedaa Maalin ama taariikh. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
In waxaa loola jeedaa Bil, sannad ama qayb maalinta. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: I wake up at six o’clock.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: At six o'clock waxaa loola jeedaa Lixda saacad. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
At noon waxaa loola jeedaa Duhurkii. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
At night waxaa loola jeedaa Habeenkii. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
On Monday waxaa loola jeedaa Isniinta. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
On 5 July waxaa loola jeedaa 5 Luulyo. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
In January waxaa loola jeedaa Jannaayo gudaheeda. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
In 2026 waxaa loola jeedaa Sannadka 2026. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
In the morning waxaa loola jeedaa Subaxdii. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.
In the evening waxaa loola jeedaa Fiidkii. Qoraalka pronunciation-ku waa hagitaan fudud, mana aha IPA.

grammar.explanationSomali: At waxaa loo adeegsadaa saacad iyo points sida noon/night. On waxaa loo adeegsadaa days iyo dates. In waxaa loo adeegsadaa months, years iyo morning/afternoon/evening.
grammar.rule: at + exact time; on + day/date; in + month/year/part of day

positiveExamples.english: I wake up at six o’clock.
The visit is on my birthday.

positiveExamples.somali: Maalintu waxay is beddeshaa saqda dhexe.

commonMistakesSomali: In Monday ❌; on Monday ✅.
At July ❌; in July ✅.
On six o’clock ❌; at six o’clock ✅.
Caado guud: at night.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Labaatan ayaa ka harsan sagaalka.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “It is twenty to nine.”.

practiceExercises.question: Timetable: English 8–9; Break 9–9:15; Math 9:15–10:15. Goormay Math dhammaataa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta “10:15” waxay si toos ah uga timid waqtiga, taariikhda ama timetable-ka.

practiceExercises.question: Review dialogue-ka: imtixaanku goormuu yahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Wada hadalka si taxaddar leh u akhri; jawaabta saxda ahi waa “12 June”.

practiceExercises.question: Akhri waqtiyo, magacow days/months, sheeg date, kadib appointment role-play samee.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Isticmaal waqti, taariikh ama jadwal male-awaal ah; xog dhab ah looma baahna.

practiceExercises.question: Qor timetable iyo paragraph toddobaadle ah oo at/on/in sax leh.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi capital letters-ka days/months iyo at/on/in.

practiceExercises.question: 6:05 waa…
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: 6:05 waa shan daqiiqo oo lixda dhaafay.

practiceExercises.question: 8:40 waa…
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: 8:40 waxaa 20 daqiiqo ka harsan sagaalka.

practiceExercises.question: 9:45 waa…
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: 9:45 waxaa 15 daqiiqo ka harsan tobanka.

practiceExercises.question: I work ___ Monday.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Maalin waxaa lala isticmaalaa on.

practiceExercises.question: The course starts ___ September.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Bil waxaa lala isticmaalaa in.

practiceExercises.question: The lesson starts ___ eight o’clock.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Saacad gaar ah waxaa lala isticmaalaa at.

practiceExercises.question: Maalinta ka dambaysa Monday waa…
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Tuesday ayaa ka dambaysa Monday.

practiceExercises.question: Bisha ka dambaysa September waa…
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: October waa bisha tobnaad.

practiceExercises.question: 21st waxaa loo akhriyaa…
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: 21st waa twenty-first.

practiceExercises.question: Timetable: English 8:00–9:00; Mathematics 9:15–10:15. Goormay Mathematics bilaabataa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Timetable-ku wuxuu sheegay Mathematics 9:15–10:15.

practiceExercises.question: Akhri shan waqti, sheeg toddobada maalmood, kadib samee ballan on Wednesday at ten.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Past/to, capital letters iyo at/on si sax ah u isticmaal.

practiceExercises.question: Qor paragraph toddobaad male-awaal ah oo 8 jumladood leh; ku dar days, times, at/on/in iyo appointment.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Maalmaha iyo bilaha capital letter ku bilow.

lessons.speakingPractice: Akhri waqtiyo, magacow days/months, sheeg date, kadib appointment role-play samee.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor timetable iyo paragraph toddobaadle ah oo at/on/in sax leh.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad dib u eegtay saacadda, past/to, half/quarter, days, months, dates, prepositions, schedules iyo appointments.

quizQuestions.question: “Clock reading” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Clock reading macnihiisu waa Akhrinta saacadda.

quizQuestions.question: The meeting is ___ Monday ___ ten.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “on / at” ayaa jumladda ama waqtiga ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Past and to” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Past and to waxaa loola jeedaa Dhaafay iyo ka harsan.

unitQuiz.question: Su’aasha saxda ah ee saacaddu waa…
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: What time is it? ayaa saacadda weydiinaysa.

unitQuiz.question: Kee ayaa sax loo qoray?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Day name wuxuu capital letter ku bilaabmaa.

unitQuiz.question: Today is Sunday. Tomorrow is…
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Maalinta Axadda ka dambaysa waa Isniin.

unitQuiz.question: Qaabka British-ka saxda ahi waa…
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Day + Month + Year waa British format.

unitQuiz.question: Timetable: English 8:00–9:00; Math 9:15–10:15. Goormay English dhammaataa?
A: Are you free on Monday? B: Yes. We can meet at ten. Goormay kulmayaan?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Wada hadalku wuxuu sheegay Monday at ten.

unitQuiz.question: A: When is the exam? B: On 12 June. Imtixaanku goormuu yahay?
U beddel: “Kulanku waa Isniinta tobanka.”
options: The meeting is in Monday on ten.
The meeting is on Monday at ten.
The meeting is at Monday in ten.
The meeting on Monday is in ten.
unitQuiz.correctAnswer: The meeting is on Monday at ten.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Day: on Monday; time: at ten.
